mapper.select: SELECT a.*, c.category_name FROM asset_info a LEFT JOIN asset_category c ON a.category_id = c.id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT a.*, c.category_name FROM asset_info a LEFT JOIN asset_category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM asset_info GROUP BY status
SELECT c.category_name, COUNT(a.id) as count FROM asset_category c LEFT JOIN asset_info a ON c.id = a.category_id WHERE c.status = 1 GROUP BY c.id, c.category_name ORDER BY count DESC
